description: End-to-end gate for the City of Fremantle per the per-council recipe. Exercises split R-codes (R20/25).

recorded.method: verify_beeliar.py --address '150 SAMSON STREET WHITE GUM VALLEY' --other-council 'City of Cockburn'. Full run: reports/fremantle_canary_run.json.
recorded.decode_library: 1,522 approved scoped rules from 46 instruments (LPS4 scheme text, 39 LPPs incl. 2.9 Residential Streetscapes and 3.x precinct policies, WAPC-endorsed strategy, 7 structure plans). Pipeline: gpt-4o-mini decode (2,607) -> gpt-4o correct (1,558 kept / 1,049 rejected) -> noise sweep (36) -> scope.

faithfulness_audit.note: 0 majority flags; 1 single-judge numeric flag verified real by operator (parking ratio doubled: quote '1 bay per 20m2 nla (minimum 2)' decoded as '2 bays per 20m2'); corrected in place.

gaps: 6 low-text drawing PDFs (4 LDPs, 2 structure plans) + LPP DGF5 (unparseable scan) + LPP DGF9 blocked by the landing-page/no-text guards; notes in target_manifest.
